title.value: SurveyX: Academic Survey Automation via Large Language Models
title.evidence: SurveyX: Academic Survey Automation via Large Language Models

value: SurveyX effectively automates the survey generation process, addressing significant limitations in existing systems, such as context window issues and outdated knowledge.
By integrating online reference retrieval and a structured pre-processing method (AttributeTree), SurveyX enhances the quality and relevance of generated surveys.
Experimental results demonstrate that SurveyX outperforms prior methods in content and citation quality, achieving results comparable to human experts.
insights.evidence: Experimental evaluation results show that SurveyX outperforms existing automated survey generation systems in content quality (0.259 improvement) and citation quality (1.76 enhancement), approaching human expert performance across multiple evaluation dimensions.

research_background.value: The rapid increase in academic publications, particularly on platforms like arXiv, has created a demand for efficient survey generation tools to help researchers synthesize vast amounts of information.
research_background.evidence: Statistics indicate that arXiv.org receives about a thousand new papers daily... the exponential growth of literature has made it increasingly challenging for researchers attempting to comprehend the technological evolution.

main_contributions.value: SurveyX introduces a two-phase system for automated survey generation, incorporating innovative reference retrieval and pre-processing techniques to enhance content quality and citation accuracy.
main_contributions.evidence: To address these deficiencies, we propose SurveyX, an efficient and well organized system for automated survey generation.

core_approach.value: The methodology consists of a Preparation Phase for reference acquisition and pre-processing, followed by a Generation Phase for survey outline and content generation, incorporating a post-refinement process.
core_approach.evidence: SurveyX divides the composing process of surveys into two phases: the Preparation Phase and the Generation Phase.

reference_acquisition.value: SurveyX employs a dual approach for reference acquisition, utilizing both offline sources (like arXiv) and a self-developed online crawler based on Google Scholar to ensure timely and relevant references.
reference_acquisition.evidence: The retrieval data source includes both offline and online data sources... The online data source is a self-developed crawler system based on Google Scholar.

retrieval_algorithms.value: The retrieval algorithm includes a Keyword Expansion Algorithm to maximize reference recall and a two-step filtering process to ensure relevance.
retrieval_algorithms.evidence: The retrieval algorithm is divided into two steps: reference recall and reference filter... We design a method called the Keyword Expansion Algorithm.

reference_preprocessing.value: The AttributeTree method categorizes and extracts key information from references, significantly enhancing the information density and context window utilization for LLMs.
reference_preprocessing.evidence: We design a reference pre-processing method called AttributeTree... This method significantly increases the information density of the reference materials.

outline_generation.value: Outline Optimization generates a primary outline using LLMs' internal knowledge and a secondary outline based on hints derived from the AttributeTree, ensuring logical rigor.
outline_generation.evidence: We designed an outline generation method named Outline Optimization... This method consists of two steps.

content_generation.value: Content generation uses a hint-based method to guide LLMs in developing the main body of the survey, ensuring consistency across subsections.
content_generation.evidence: During the content generation stage, inspired by the human writing process for surveys, we continue to use the hint-based method employed during the outline generation stage.

post_optimization.value: The post-refinement stage enhances the content quality through a RAG-based rewriting module and generates figures and tables to improve presentation.
post_optimization.evidence: We have constructed a comprehensive and systematic post refinement stage that significantly enhances the overall quality of the generated survey while expanding its expressive format.
